apps.name: Gearbound
apps.subtitle: Defeat Monster
apps.localizedDescription: Gearbound Strike is a puzzle game where you defeat monsters with your gear. Explore dangerous areas, battle powerful enemies and become the ultimate warrior.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: We need access to your camera to let you make a photo when needed.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: App may request microphone access when needed.
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: This ATT ID will be used to deliver personalized ads to you.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We need access to your photo library to let you choose a photo when needed.
